html:
Exclusive to:

GenericToo wetToo dryBalancedBurnt

The Composting Bin is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is used to produce Compost.

The Composting Bin accepts items that fall under two categories:

Category Items
Wet All Foods,
Dry

After a period of time, the Compost Bin consumes two items and produces Compost. If possible, it consumes one item from each category, otherwise it consumes two from the same category.

The composting time depends on the current load of the compost bin: The more items, the quicker the composting is done. Composting time also depends on the ratio of wet and dry items. It is fastest when there is 50% of each category and slowest when there are only items of one category.

Next Compost Time
Items Loaded Time (days)
Balanced Unbalanced
6 0.56 1.12
4 - 5 0.68 1.36
2 - 3 0.8 1.6
Total
(for 3 composts
without reload) 		2.04 4.08

Tips

  • For Rot, turning it into Compost and then burning it makes it more efficient.

Trivia

  • The Composting Bin was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Composting Bin
"Make stinky rich soil."
Object Info
Perk
Produce Compost.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×3 ×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"compostingbin"
GenericToo wetToo dryBalancedBurnt
“I can barrel-y stand the smell.”
–Wilson
“Ew, why do we have this?”
–Willow
“Is barrel of stink dirt.”
–Wolfgang
“Food for worms.”
–Wendy
“A RECEPTACLE OF ORGANIC WASTE”
–WX-78
“Composting is an essential component to gardening.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not exactly a barrel of maple syrup...”
–Woodie
“Disgusting.”
–Maxwell
“A barrel öf stink.”
–Wigfrid
“Let's make food for the plants!”
–Webber
“A good place for food scraps.”
–Warly
“Yum!”
–Wormwood
“It's dirty work, but somebody's got to do it.”
–Winona
“Not exactly a barrel of laughs.”
–Wortox
“Look like nice warm place to nap.”
–Wurt
“Oooh, compost bins usually have all kinds of interesting bugs in them!”
–Walter
“Just how long is this going to take?”
–Wanda
“That looks too soggy.”
–Wilson
“It's all wet and gross.”
–Willow
“Squishy soggy.”
–Wolfgang
“It's far too watery, the poor plants might drown.”
–Wendy
“HORRIBLY MOIST”
–WX-78
“The moisture level of this mixture is too high.”
–Wickerbottom
“A bit too soggy.”
–Woodie
“It's nothing but foul wet slop.”
–Maxwell
“Söggy muck.”
–Wigfrid
“It's all wet and goopy.”
–Webber
“Too runny, it needs less moisture.”
–Warly
“Too wet”
–Wormwood
“I'd guess there's a bit too much water in there.”
–Winona
“I tried and yet, it's far too wet.”
–Wortox
“Gooshy.”
–Wurt
“This might be a bit too wet.”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, it's turned into a wet muck!”
–Wanda
“Hm... too dry.”
–Wilson
“Is it supposed to be that dry?”
–Willow
“Too dry.”
–Wolfgang
“Dry and brittle.”
–Wendy
“DRY”
–WX-78
“It requires a bit more moisture.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nah, that's too dry.”
–Woodie
“Positively arid.”
–Maxwell
“It's sö dry it's nearly dust.”
–Wigfrid
“It's like sand!”
–Webber
“Non, far too dry!”
–Warly
“Too dry”
–Wormwood
“Looks a bit dry to me.”
–Winona
“Nice try, but it's too dry.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, is too dry.”
–Wurt
“Hm... does that look a bit too dry, Woby?”
–Walter
“Oh. It's much dryer than I expected.”
–Wanda
“Just right!”
–Wilson
“I guess it looks okay? For a pile of rotten dirt?”
–Willow
“Is good! Dirt is ready!”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose this will do well enough.”
–Wendy
“OPTIMAL”
–WX-78
“A well balanced mix.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks aboot right.”
–Woodie
“This should suffice.”
–Maxwell
“That shall dö.”
–Wigfrid
“We think it's ready!”
–Webber
“Tres bon!”
–Warly
“Is good”
–Wormwood
“That should do it!”
–Winona
“What a delight, it turned out just right!”
–Wortox
“It good!”
–Wurt
“That looks pretty good!”
–Walter
“Perfect! I hope I can remember how I did it...”
–Wanda
“I didn't think it could smell any worse...”
–Wilson
“Nice.”
–Willow
“Can't use anymore.”
–Wolfgang
“Ashes to ashes.”
–Wendy
“IT IS DEAD”
–WX-78
“Well... I suppose plants need carbon too.”
–Wickerbottom
“Well that's a smell.”
–Woodie
“It smells about as bad as you'd imagine.”
–Maxwell
“Reduced tö ash.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh oh...”
–Webber
“Burnt to a crisp.”
–Warly
“Nooooo!”
–Wormwood
“Guess I'll have to start from scratch.”
–Winona
“How silly!”
–Wortox
“Who did it?!”
–Wurt
“We should all really be more careful with fire!”
–Walter
“A fine mess this is...”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thùng Làm Phân Xanh là một Cấu Trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được sử dụng để sản xuất phân Compost.
